name: rldyour-lsps
description: Маршрутизация LSP, health checks и Serena integration. EN: Language server workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Языковые серверы. EN: LSP and Serena
interface.longDescription: Маршрутизация LSP Codex для diagnostics, type checks, symbols и Serena integration. EN: This skills-only plugin defines the rldyour language server workflow for Codex. It should be selected automatically when work involves language servers, diagnostics, type checking, code intelligence, symbol navigation, semantic refactors, or project setup for Python, Rust, Dart and Flutter, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, C, C++, Qt and QML, YAML, Docker, HTML, CSS, Shell, JSON, TOML, or Markdown. The plugin does not declare MCP servers and does not start LSPs as MCP transports. It documents stable LSP executables, health checks, install profiles, project prerequisites, and how Serena MCP should use LSP-backed language keys where Serena supports them. Runtime LSP commands should be stable local executables; first-run package managers such as bunx or uvx are reserved for setup and checks, not long-lived stdio language server sessions. User-facing conversation remains Russian unless the owner asks otherwise, while repository documentation is written in English.
defaultPrompt: Используй $lsp-health-check: проверь language servers. EN: LSP health.
Используй $serena-lsp-integration: выровняй Serena languages. EN: Serena LSP.
Используй $lsp-routing: выбери LSP workflow. EN: route language servers.
